heatmap.description: 用于显示二维数据密度或相关性的热力图
heatmap.code_snippet:
import seaborn as sns
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

def create_heatmap(data, title='热力图', xlabel='X轴', ylabel='Y轴',
                   cmap='YlOrRd', figsize=(14, 10)):
    plt.figure(figsize=figsize)
    sns.heatmap(data, cmap=cmap, linewidths=0.5,
                cbar_kws={'label': '数值'}, annot=True, fmt='.1f')
    plt.title(title, fontsize=14)
    plt.xlabel(xlabel, fontsize=12)
    plt.ylabel(ylabel, fontsize=12)
    plt.tight_layout()
    return plt
heatmap.example_use_case: 主播活动热力图、相关性矩阵

line_chart.description: 用于显示时间序列或趋势变化的折线图
line_chart.code_snippet:
def create_line_chart(x_data, y_data_list, labels, title='折线图',
                      xlabel='时间', ylabel='数值', figsize=(12, 8)):
    plt.figure(figsize=figsize)
    for i, y_data in enumerate(y_data_list):
        plt.plot(x_data, y_data, label=labels[i], linewidth=2, marker='o')
    plt.title(title, fontsize=14)
    plt.xlabel(xlabel, fontsize=12)
    plt.ylabel(ylabel, fontsize=12)
    plt.legend(fontsize=10)
    plt.grid(True, alpha=0.3)
    return plt
line_chart.example_use_case: 24小时成交量趋势、主播活动模式

bar_chart.description: 用于分类数据比较的柱状图
bar_chart.code_snippet:
def create_bar_chart(categories, values, title='柱状图',
                     xlabel='类别', ylabel='数值', figsize=(10, 6)):
    plt.figure(figsize=figsize)
    colors = plt.cm.Set3(np.arange(len(categories)) / len(categories))
    plt.bar(categories, values, color=colors, edgecolor='black')
    plt.title(title, fontsize=14)
    plt.xlabel(xlabel, fontsize=12)
    plt.ylabel(ylabel, fontsize=12)
    plt.xticks(rotation=45, ha='right')
    # 添加数值标签
    for i, v in enumerate(values):
        plt.text(i, v, f'{v:.1f}', ha='center', va='bottom')
    return plt
bar_chart.example_use_case: 渠道表现对比、主播排名

pie_chart.description: 用于显示部分与整体关系的饼图
pie_chart.code_snippet:
def create_pie_chart(labels, sizes, title='饼图', figsize=(8, 8)):
    plt.figure(figsize=figsize)
    colors = plt.cm.Set2(np.arange(len(labels)) / len(labels))
    plt.pie(sizes, labels=labels, colors=colors, autopct='%1.1f%%',
            startangle=90, textprops={'fontsize': 10})
    # 添加中心圆
    centre_circle = plt.Circle((0,0), 0.70, fc='white')
    fig = plt.gcf()
    fig.gca().add_artist(centre_circle)
    plt.title(title, fontsize=14)
    return plt

scatter_plot.description: 用于显示两个变量关系的散点图
scatter_plot.code_snippet:
def create_scatter_plot(x_data, y_data, colors=None, sizes=None,
                        title='散点图', xlabel='X轴', ylabel='Y轴',
                        figsize=(10, 8)):
    plt.figure(figsize=figsize)
    scatter = plt.scatter(x_data, y_data, c=colors, s=sizes,
                         alpha=0.6, cmap='viridis')
    if colors is not None:
        plt.colorbar(scatter, label='颜色值')
    plt.title(title, fontsize=14)
    plt.xlabel(xlabel, fontsize=12)
    plt.ylabel(ylabel, fontsize=12)
    plt.grid(True, alpha=0.3)
    return plt

multi_column_bar.description: 用于多分类数据比较的多列条形图
multi_column_bar.code_snippet:
def create_multi_column_bar(categories, data_dict, title='多列条形图',
                           xlabel='类别', ylabel='数值', figsize=(12, 8)):
    plt.figure(figsize=figsize)
    x = np.arange(len(categories))
    width = 0.8 / len(data_dict)

    for i, (group_name, values) in enumerate(data_dict.items()):
        offset = (i - len(data_dict)/2 + 0.5) * width
        plt.bar(x + offset, values, width, label=group_name,
               edgecolor='black')

    plt.title(title, fontsize=14)
    plt.xlabel(xlabel, fontsize=12)
    plt.ylabel(ylabel, fontsize=12)
    plt.xticks(x, categories, rotation=45, ha='right')
    plt.legend(fontsize=10)
    plt.tight_layout()
    return plt
multi_column_bar.example_use_case: 多渠道对比、多产品线分析

stacked_bar.description: 用于显示部分与整体关系的分层柱形图
stacked_bar.code_snippet:
def create_stacked_bar(categories, data_layers, layer_names,
                      title='分层柱形图', xlabel='类别', ylabel='数值',
                      figsize=(12, 8)):
    plt.figure(figsize=figsize)
    x = np.arange(len(categories))
    bottom = np.zeros(len(categories))

    for i, (layer_name, values) in enumerate(zip(layer_names, data_layers)):
        plt.bar(x, values, bottom=bottom, label=layer_name,
               edgecolor='black')
        bottom += values

    plt.title(title, fontsize=14)
    plt.xlabel(xlabel, fontsize=12)
    plt.ylabel(ylabel, fontsize=12)
    plt.xticks(x, categories, rotation=45, ha='right')
    plt.legend(fontsize=10, loc='upper left')
    plt.tight_layout()
    return plt
stacked_bar.example_use_case: 收入构成分析、用户分层统计

butterfly_chart.description: 用于两组数据对比的蝴蝶图（背靠背条形图）
butterfly_chart.code_snippet:
def create_butterfly_chart(categories, left_values, right_values,
                          left_label='左侧', right_label='右侧',
                          title='蝴蝶图', figsize=(10, 6)):
    plt.figure(figsize=figsize)
    y_pos = np.arange(len(categories))

    plt.barh(y_pos, left_values, color='skyblue', edgecolor='black',
            label=left_label)
    plt.barh(y_pos, -right_values, color='lightcoral', edgecolor='black',
            label=right_label)

    plt.title(title, fontsize=14)
    plt.yticks(y_pos, categories)
    plt.xlabel('数值', fontsize=12)
    plt.legend(fontsize=10)

    # 添加数值标签
    for i, v in enumerate(left_values):
        plt.text(v, i, f'{v}', ha='left', va='center', fontsize=9)
    for i, v in enumerate(right_values):
        plt.text(-v, i, f'{v}', ha='right', va='center', fontsize=9)

    plt.tight_layout()
    return plt
butterfly_chart.example_use_case: 男女用户对比、收入支出对比

pareto_chart.description: 用于识别主要因素的帕累托图（柱状图+累积曲线）
pareto_chart.code_snippet:
def create_pareto_chart(categories, values, title='帕累托图',
                       xlabel='类别', ylabel='频次', figsize=(12, 8)):
    plt.figure(figsize=figsize)

    # 按值排序
    sorted_indices = np.argsort(values)[::-1]
    sorted_categories = [categories[i] for i in sorted_indices]
    sorted_values = [values[i] for i in sorted_indices]

    # 计算累积百分比
    cumsum = np.cumsum(sorted_values)
    cumsum_percent = cumsum / cumsum[-1] * 100

    # 创建双轴
    fig, ax1 = plt.subplots(figsize=figsize)

    # 柱状图
    bars = ax1.bar(range(len(sorted_categories)), sorted_values,
                  color='skyblue', edgecolor='black', alpha=0.7)
    ax1.set_xlabel(xlabel, fontsize=12)
    ax1.set_ylabel(ylabel, fontsize=12)
    ax1.set_xticks(range(len(sorted_categories)))
    ax1.set_xticklabels(sorted_categories, rotation=45, ha='right')

    # 累积曲线
    ax2 = ax1.twinx()
    ax2.plot(range(len(sorted_categories)), cumsum_percent,
            color='red', marker='o', linewidth=2)
    ax2.set_ylabel('累积百分比 (%)', fontsize=12)
    ax2.set_ylim(0, 110)
    ax2.grid(True, alpha=0.3)

    plt.title(title, fontsize=14)
    plt.tight_layout()
    return plt
pareto_chart.example_use_case: 问题原因分析、销量贡献分析

bubble_chart.description: 用于三维数据可视化的气泡图（x,y,size）
bubble_chart.code_snippet:
def create_bubble_chart(x_data, y_data, sizes, colors=None,
                       title='气泡图', xlabel='X轴', ylabel='Y轴',
                       size_label='大小', figsize=(12, 8)):
    plt.figure(figsize=figsize)

    # 标准化大小用于显示
    scaled_sizes = (sizes - sizes.min()) / (sizes.max() - sizes.min()) * 500 + 50

    scatter = plt.scatter(x_data, y_data, s=scaled_sizes, c=colors,
                         alpha=0.6, cmap='viridis', edgecolors='black')

    if colors is not None:
        plt.colorbar(scatter, label='颜色')

    plt.title(title, fontsize=14)
    plt.xlabel(xlabel, fontsize=12)
    plt.ylabel(ylabel, fontsize=12)
    plt.grid(True, alpha=0.3)

    # 添加图例说明大小
    import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
    size_info = f'大小表示: {size_label}'
    plt.text(0.02, 0.98, size_info, transform=plt.gca().transAxes,
            fontsize=10, verticalalignment='top',
            bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='wheat', alpha=0.5))

    plt.tight_layout()
    return plt
bubble_chart.example_use_case: 产品分析、市场细分、绩效评估

bar_line_combo.description: 柱状图和折线图组合图表
bar_line_combo.code_snippet:
def create_bar_line_combo(categories, bar_values, line_values,
                         bar_label='数量', line_label='比例',
                         title='条形折线组合图', xlabel='类别', ylabel='数值',
                         figsize=(12, 8)):
    fig, ax1 = plt.subplots(figsize=figsize)

    # 柱状图
    bars = ax1.bar(categories, bar_values, color='skyblue',
                  edgecolor='black', alpha=0.7, label=bar_label)
    ax1.set_xlabel(xlabel, fontsize=12)
    ax1.set_ylabel(bar_label, fontsize=12)
    ax1.tick_params(axis='y')
    ax1.set_xticklabels(categories, rotation=45, ha='right')

    # 折线图（第二个y轴）
    ax2 = ax1.twinx()
    line = ax2.plot(categories, line_values, color='red', marker='o',
                   linewidth=2, label=line_label)
    ax2.set_ylabel(line_label, fontsize=12, color='red')
    ax2.tick_params(axis='y', labelcolor='red')

    # 合并图例
    lines1, labels1 = ax1.get_legend_handles_labels()
    lines2, labels2 = ax2.get_legend_handles_labels()
    ax1.legend(lines1 + lines2, labels1 + labels2, fontsize=10)

    plt.title(title, fontsize=14)
    plt.tight_layout()
    return plt
bar_line_combo.example_use_case: 销量与增长率、收入与利润率

waterfall_chart.description: 用于显示累积效果的瀑布图，展示从初始值到最终值的逐步变化
waterfall_chart.code_snippet:
def create_waterfall_chart(categories, values, title='瀑布图',
                          xlabel='类别', ylabel='数值', figsize=(12, 8)):
    plt.figure(figsize=figsize)
    
    # 计算累积值
    cumulative = np.zeros(len(categories))
    for i in range(len(categories)):
        cumulative[i] = cumulative[i-1] + values[i] if i > 0 else values[i]
    
    # 创建条形图
    colors = []
    for val in values:
        if val >= 0:
            colors.append('lightgreen')
        else:
            colors.append('lightcoral')
    
    plt.bar(categories, values, bottom=np.append(0, cumulative[:-1]), 
           color=colors, edgecolor='black')
    
    # 添加连接线
    for i in range(len(categories)-1):
        plt.plot([i, i+1], [cumulative[i], cumulative[i]], 
                color='gray', linestyle='--', linewidth=1)
    
    plt.title(title, fontsize=14)
    plt.xlabel(xlabel, fontsize=12)
    plt.ylabel(ylabel, fontsize=12)
    plt.xticks(rotation=45, ha='right')
    plt.grid(True, alpha=0.3)
    plt.tight_layout()
    return plt
waterfall_chart.example_use_case: 财务分析、利润分解、预算变化分析

bubble_bar_chart.description: 气泡条形图，结合条形图和气泡图的特点，用于多维度数据展示
bubble_bar_chart.code_snippet:
def create_bubble_bar_chart(categories, bar_values, bubble_sizes, 
                           colors=None, title='气泡条形图', 
                           xlabel='类别', ylabel='数值', size_label='大小',
                           figsize=(12, 8)):
    plt.figure(figsize=figsize)
    
    # 创建条形图
    x_pos = np.arange(len(categories))
    bars = plt.bar(x_pos, bar_values, color='skyblue', 
                  edgecolor='black', alpha=0.7)
    
    # 创建气泡图（叠加在条形图上）
    scaled_sizes = (bubble_sizes - bubble_sizes.min()) / (bubble_sizes.max() - bubble_sizes.min()) * 500 + 50
    
    if colors is None:
        colors = plt.cm.viridis(np.arange(len(categories)) / len(categories))
    
    scatter = plt.scatter(x_pos, bar_values, s=scaled_sizes, c=colors,
                         alpha=0.8, edgecolors='black')
    
    plt.title(title, fontsize=14)
    plt.xlabel(xlabel, fontsize=12)
    plt.ylabel(ylabel, fontsize=12)
    plt.xticks(x_pos, categories, rotation=45, ha='right')
    plt.grid(True, alpha=0.3)
    
    # 添加图例说明
    import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
    size_info = f'气泡大小表示: {size_label}'
    plt.text(0.02, 0.98, size_info, transform=plt.gca().transAxes,
            fontsize=10, verticalalignment='top',
            bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='wheat', alpha=0.5))
    
    plt.tight_layout()
    return plt
bubble_bar_chart.example_use_case: 产品多维度对比、绩效综合评估

bubble_chart_2.description: 增强型气泡图，支持四维数据展示（x,y,size,color）
bubble_chart_2.code_snippet:
def create_bubble_chart_2(x_data, y_data, sizes, colors, 
                         title='增强型气泡图', xlabel='X轴', ylabel='Y轴',
                         size_label='大小', color_label='颜色', figsize=(12, 8)):
    plt.figure(figsize=figsize)
    
    # 标准化大小用于显示
    scaled_sizes = (sizes - sizes.min()) / (sizes.max() - sizes.min()) * 500 + 50
    
    # 创建气泡图
    scatter = plt.scatter(x_data, y_data, s=scaled_sizes, c=colors,
                         alpha=0.7, cmap='viridis', edgecolors='black')
    
    plt.colorbar(scatter, label=color_label)
    
    plt.title(title, fontsize=14)
    plt.xlabel(xlabel, fontsize=12)
    plt.ylabel(ylabel, fontsize=12)
    plt.grid(True, alpha=0.3)
    
    # 添加图例说明
    import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
    size_info = f'大小表示: {size_label}, 颜色表示: {color_label}'
    plt.text(0.02, 0.98, size_info, transform=plt.gca().transAxes,
            fontsize=10, verticalalignment='top',
            bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='wheat', alpha=0.5))
    
    plt.tight_layout()
    return plt
bubble_chart_2.example_use_case: 四维数据分析、多变量关系可视化
